entries.text:
Verse 1

kingdom

(See Scofield "Matthew 3:2")

Verse 6

world

kosmos = world-system. John 7:7; Revelation 13:3-8 (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 8

everlasting

The Greek has "the" before "everlasting."

Verse 9

hell

gehenna. (See Scofield "Matthew 5:22").

Verse 10

angels

(See Scofield "Hebrews 1:4").

Verse 11

lost

Son of man

(See Scofield "Matthew 8:20")

save (See Scofield "Romans 1:16")

lost (Greek - ἀπόλλυμι). (See Scofield "John 3:16")

Verse 15

trespass

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23")

Verse 21

sin

(See Scofield "Romans 3:23")

Verse 23

kingdom

(See Scofield "Matthew 3:2")

Verse 34

tormentors

The ground of law, of exact justice. Cf. grace, Romans 3:23; Romans 3:24; Ephesians 4:30; John 1:17 (See Scofield "John 1:17")
